cognitive_layer.purpose: The k-nearest neighbor graph represents each cell's relationship to other cells based on transcriptional similarity. This graph is the foundation for clustering, trajectory analysis, and UMAP visualization. The graph captures local structure in the data.

parameter_impact.n_neighbors: Number of neighbors for each cell. More neighbors create smoother transitions between populations. Fewer neighbors preserve more local, fine-grained structure.
parameter_impact.n_pcs: Number of principal components to use for distance calculation. Fewer PCs may miss subtle structure; more may include noise.

error_handling.ValueError: n_neighbors must be less tha: Ensure n_neighbors is less than the number of cells after filtering.

fragmented_clusters.causal_chain: More neighbors creates a smoother graph, connecting similar cells across a broader neighborhood, reducing fragmentation.

merged_clusters.causal_chain: Fewer neighbors makes the graph more local and sensitive to fine-grained differences between cells.
